mapper.sql: kb.id, kb.name, kb.description, kb.doc_type, kb.chunk_strategy_json, kb.search_strategy, kb.doc_count, kb.owner_id, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS owner_name, kb.created_at, kb.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM knowledge_base kb LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = kb.owner_id WHERE kb.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_base (id, name, description, doc_type, chunk_strategy_json, search_strategy, doc_count, owner_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{docType}, #{chunkStrategyJson}, #{searchStrategy}, 0, #{ownerId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM knowledge_base WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_base SET doc_count = doc_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE knowledge_base SET doc_count = GREATEST(0, doc_count - #{count}), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
